description: Onboarding stage 06 (targeted advice). Advisor connects priors collected over earlier stages and gives a category-level direction (e.g. calcium absorption + steady DHA) without naming a brand. Invites more information before specifics. Problem_solving primary, guided_exploration tolerable.

turns.user_input: 前面跟你聊的那些情况，你建议我怎么做呀？
现在喝的奶粉是某品牌的，配料表我可以拍给你看一下。
那你直接告诉我买哪款吧。
